headerSub: Board-ready financial analysis · Percentage-first language · Executive summaries
noDataMessage: Upload data or connect a source to see financial metrics here.
followUpPrompt: Follow up on the CFO report: {title}
reportFallback: Report generated — no data available yet. Connect a data source to get real figures.
reportError: Could not generate report. Please try again.
plSummaryPrompt: Give me a CFO-mode P&L summary for this period — use percentage-first language and highlight the most important variance.
cashRunwayPrompt: How many months of cash runway do I have at current burn rate? What are the scenarios if revenue drops 10% or 20%?
marginAnalysisPrompt: Analyse my gross margin by product category and flag anything that is eroding profitability versus last period.
boardReportPrompt: Generate a board-ready one-page executive summary of my business performance this period, using percentage-first language throughout.
workingCapitalPrompt: Assess my working capital position — receivables, payables, inventory. Where are the cash conversion cycle bottlenecks?
costStructurePrompt: Break down my cost structure and identify the top 3 areas where I could reduce costs without impacting growth.
